message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
skinparam classAttributeIconSize 0

class Player {
  log: Logger
  id: Integer
  start_field: ConnectedField
  pieces: List of Piece
  home: List of HomeField
  dest: List of Field
  # name: String
  ~ id: Integer
  ~ start_field: ConnectedField
  ~ home: List of HomeField
  ~ dest: List of Field
  --
  + Player(\n\tlog: Logger ,\n\tplayer_id: Integer,\n\tstart_field: ConnectedField,\n\thome_obsv: (\n\t\tCallable(owner: Integer, field: Integer),\n\t\tCallable(owner: Integer, field: Integer),\n\t),\n\tdest_obsv: (\n\t\tCallable(owner: Integer, field: Integer),\n\t\tCallable(owner: Integer, field: Integer),\n\t),\n\t): Player
  + init_home(\n\tobsv: (\n\t\tCallable(owner: Integer, field: Integer),\n\t\tCallable(owner: Integer, field: Integer),\n\t)\n\t)
  + init_dest(\n\tobsv: (\n\t\tCallable(owner: Integer, field: Integer),\n\t\tCallable(owner: Integer, field: Integer),\n\t)\n\t)
  --
  + calc_dests(distance: Integer)
  + can_move(): Boolean
  + can_throw(): Boolean
  + has_won(): Boolean
  + wrap_obsv(\n\tobsv: (\n\t\tCallable(owner: Integer, field: Integer),\n\t\tCallable(owner: Integer, field: Integer),\n\t)\n\t): (\n\tCallable(field: Integer),\n\tCallable(field: Integer)\n\t)
  + __str__(): String
}

class Game {
  log: Logger
  die: Die
  players: List of Player
  all_players: List of Player
  active_player_idx: Integer
  track: List of ConnectedField
  tries: Integer
  allow_move: Boolean
  - active_player: Player
  --
  end_turn_obsv: Callable(player: Integer)
  begin_turn_obsv: Callable(player: Integer)
  home_vacated_obsv: Callable(owner: Integer, field: Integer)
  home_filled_obsv: Callable(owner: Integer, field: Integer, place: Integer)
  track_vacated_obsv: Callable(field: Integer)
  track_filled_obsv: Callable(field: Integer, place: Integer)
  dest_vacated_obsv: Callable(owner: Integer, field: Integer)
  dest_filled_obsv: Callable(owner: Integer, field: Integer, place: Integer)
  game_end_obsv: Callable(winner: Integer)
  --
  + Game(\n\tlog: Logger,\n\tend_turn_obsv: Callable(player: Integer),\n\tbegin_turn_obsv: Callable(player: Integer),\n\thome_vacated_obsv: Callable(owner: Integer, field: Integer),\n\thome_filled_obsv: Callable(owner: Integer, field: Integer, place: Integer),\n\ttrack_vacated_obsv: Callable(field: Integer),\n\ttrack_filled_obsv: Callable(field: Integer, place: Integer),\n\tdest_vacated_obsv: Callable(owner: Integer, field: Integer),\n\tdest_filled_obsv: Callable(owner: Integer, field: Integer, place: Integer),\n\tgame_end_obsv: Callable(winner: Integer),\n\t): Game
  + init_track()
  --
  ~ set_players(players: Iterator over (Integer, Boolean))
  ~ roll_die(): Integer
  --
  ~ try_move_home(owner_id: Integer, field_id: Integer)
  ~ try_move_track(field_id: Integer)
  ~ try_move_dest(owner_id: Integer, field_id: Integer)
  ~ allow_move()
  ~ try_move(src: Field)
  --
  - player(num: int): Player
  - end_move()
  - next_player()
  - begin_turn()
  - begin_move()
}

class Die {
  log: Logger
  pips: Integer
  --
  + Die(log: Logger): Die
  + roll()
  + get(): Integer
  --
  + __str__(): String
}

class HomeField {
  --
  HomeField(\n\tfield_id: Integer,\n\tlog: Logger,\n\tstart_field: Field,\n\tvacate_obsv: Callable(field: Integer),\n\tfill_obsv: Callable(field: Integer, place: Integer),\n\t): HomeField
  + try_dest(player: Player, distance: Integer): Optional Field
  + skip(distance: Integer, player: Player): Optional Field
}

class ConnectedField {
  next_field: Field
  --
  ConnectedField(\n\tfield_id: Integer,\n\tlog: Logger,\n\tname: String,\n\tvacate_obsv: Callable(field: Integer),\n\tfill_obsv: Callable(field: Integer, place: Integer),\n\t): ConnectedField
  + connect_next(next_field: Field)
  + try_dest(player: Player, distance: Integer): Optional Field
  + is_packed(): Boolean
  ~ skip(distance: Integer, player: Player)
  - player_next_field(player: Player): Field
}

class Field {
  ~ log: Logger
  ~ id: Integer
  ~ piece: Piece
  # id: Integer
  # piece: Piece
  ~ occupant: Player
  ~ vacated_obsv: Callable(field: Integer)
  ~ filled_obsv: Callable(field: Integer, place: Integer)
  --
  + Field(\n\tfield_id: Integer,\n\tlog: Logger,\n\tname: String,\n\tvacate_obsv: Callable(field: Integer),\n\tfill_obsv: Callable(field: Integer, place: Integer),\n\t): Field
  + vacate()
  + fill(piece: Piece)
  + try_dest(player: Player, distance: Integer): Optional Field
  + is_packed(): Boolean
  + skip(distance: Integer): Optional Field
}

class Piece {
  log: Logger
  owner: Player
  location: Field
  dest: Optional Field
  ~ owner: Player
  ~ dest: Optional Field
  --
  + Piece(\n\tlog: Logger,\n\tpiece_id: Integer,\n\towner: Player,\n\tlocation: HomeField,\n\t): Piece
  + calc_dest(distance: Integer)
  + move_to_home()
  + move_to_dest()
  - move_to(dest: Field)
  + __str__(): String
}

Field <|-- HomeField
Field <|-- ConnectedField

Game "1" --> "1" Die
Game "1" --> "4" Player
Player "1" --> "4" HomeField
Player "1" --> "1" ConnectedField : 1
Game "1" --> "1" Player : 1
ConnectedField "40" --> "1" ConnectedField
Game "1" --> "3" ConnectedField
Piece "0..1" --> "1" Field
Piece "0..1" --> "1" Field
Player "1" --> "1" Piece : 1
HomeField "4" --> "4" Piece
@enduml
```
